title: NoSculkSpread
description: NoSculkPlugin is an anti-grief Minecraft plugin that disables Sculk Catalyst propagation and prevents Sculk block growth. It helps server admins stop unwanted Sculk spreading and includes the option to toggle console messages for better monitoring.
body:
**NoSculkPlugin** is an anti-grief plugin for Minecraft that helps server administrators prevent unwanted Sculk propagation and block growth. This plugin disables the spread of Sculk Catalyst and the formation of Sculk blocks, which can be used for griefing or to cause unwanted block spread in protected areas.

The plugin also includes a simple command, **/nosculk msg**, which allows admins to toggle console messages for actions related to Sculk, such as when the propagation is cancelled. This provides better control over what is logged and can help prevent unnecessary spam in the console.

**Key Features:**

**Prevents Sculk Catalyst Propagation:** Stops the spread of Sculk through the world, which could otherwise be used to grief areas.

**Stops Sculk Block Growth:** Blocks the formation of Sculk blocks, preventing unwanted growth in protected areas.

**Command to Toggle Console Messages:** The /nosculk msg command allows you to toggle on or off the console messages for Sculk-related actions, giving you more control over what is logged.

**Anti-Grief:** Specifically designed to prevent griefing through the use of Sculk-related mechanics in the game.

**Compatible Versions:**

Minecraft 1.21 and later.
Works with Paper, Purpur, Spigot, and other Bukkit-based servers.
This plugin is ideal for server administrators who want to maintain a clean, protected world and prevent the spread of Sculk in griefing attempts. It’s simple to install and use, and it enhances your ability to manage Sculk-related mechanics with minimal effort.
